allow: Bash(gh repo create wgetApp --public --source=. --push --description "Windows software installer app using wget - Electron based")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(a[''name'']\) for a in data.get\(''assets'',[]\)]")

Bash(./resources/wget.exe --user-agent="Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" --no-check-certificate --timeout=10 -O /dev/null "https://www.maxthon.com/en/download/")
Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\(''data/utilities.json''\)\); print\(f''Valid JSON with {len\(data\)} entries''\)")
Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\(''data/security.json''\)\); print\(f''Valid JSON with {len\(data\)} entries''\)")

Bash(./resources/wget.exe --spider --no-check-certificate --timeout=10 --user-agent="Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" "https://download.glasswire.com/GlassWireSetup.exe")
